'''32-19K''' was an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] in the [[Peragus asteroid field]]. It almost certainly blew up with the rest of the asteroid field, due to a poorly-aimed shot from the [[Harbinger (Hammerhead-class)|Harbinger]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{Mo}}
